_comment: Prompt for extracting memories from conversation. Used by the memory consolidation system.
template:
Summarize this conversation for future memory. Focus only on:
- New phrases the user learned (list them)
- Pronunciation difficulties observed (specific sounds/tones they struggled with)
- User preferences expressed (formality, topics, goals)
- Locations or scenarios discussed
- Important personal context shared
- Belonging moments: times the user successfully navigated a real situation, made a local laugh, handled something independently, or felt at home
- Upcoming real-world situations the user mentioned (tonight, tomorrow, this week) and any anxiety or excitement about them
- Social goals the user expressed (making local friends, dating, networking, blending in)
- Micro-crises that happened: something that went wr felt awkward, or confused them
- Risk tolerance signals: are they shy and cautious or bold and willing to try things

Respond in this JSON format and nothing else:
{
  "entries": [
    {"key": "learned_phrase", "value": "[phrase] in [language] - [mastery: learning/practiced/mastered]"},
    {"key": "pronunciation_note", "value": "[specific observation]"},
    {"key": "preference", "value": "[what they prefer]"},
    {"key": "session_summary", "value": "[1 sentence: what happened this session]"},
    {"key": "belonging_moment", "value": "[what the user did] in [location] — [why it matters to their confidence]"},
    {"key": "upcoming_situation", "value": "[what they're about to do] — [how they feel about it]"},
    {"key": "social_goal", "value": "[what they're trying to achieve socially here]"},
    {"key": "micro_crisis", "value": "[what went wrong or felt awkward] — [how they handled it]"},
    {"key": "risk_tolerance", "value": "[cautious/moderate/bold] — [evidence from conversation]"}
  ]
}

Only include entries for things that were actually discussed. If nothing notable, return {"entries":[]}.
